polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary: Bearish: Market sentiment leans toward stability, as only 38% of traders believe Ethereum will dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026. With $275,303 in volume, the majority of the market is betting against a significant crash, suggesting a baseline level of confidence in ETH's price floor over the next two years.
